controls.title: The organizational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management
controls.description: The organizational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management.

controls.title: Internal and external stakeholders are understood, and their needs and expectations regarding cybersecurity risk management are understood and considered
controls.description: Internal and external stakeholders are understood, and their needs and expectations regarding cybersecurity risk management are understood and considered.

controls.title: Legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements regarding cybersecurity are understood and managed
controls.description: Legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements regarding cybersecurity — including privacy and civil liberties obligations — are understood and managed.

controls.title: Critical objectives, capabilities, and services that stakeholders depend on or expect are understood and communicated
controls.description: Critical objectives, capabilities, and services that stakeholders depend on or expect from the organization are understood and communicated.

controls.title: Outcomes, capabilities, and services that the organization depends on are understood and communicated
controls.description: Outcomes, capabilities, and services that the organization depends on are understood and communicated.

controls.title: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders
controls.description: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders.

controls.title: Risk appetite and risk tolerance statements are established, communicated, and maintained
controls.description: Risk appetite and risk tolerance statements are established, communicated, and maintained.

controls.title: Cybersecurity risk management activities and outcomes are included in enterprise risk management processes
controls.description: Cybersecurity risk management activities and outcomes are included in enterprise risk management processes.

controls.title: Strategic direction that describes appropriate risk response options is established and communicated
controls.description: Strategic direction that describes appropriate risk response options is established and communicated.

controls.title: Lines of communication across the organization are established for cybersecurity risks
controls.description: Lines of communication across the organization are established for cybersecurity risks, including risks from suppliers and other third parties.

controls.title: A standardized method for calculating, documenting, categorizing, and prioritizing cybersecurity risks is established and communicated
controls.description: A standardized method for calculating, documenting, categorizing, and prioritizing cybersecurity risks is established and communicated.

controls.title: Strategic opportunities (i.e., positive risks) are characterized and included in organizational cybersecurity risk discussions
controls.description: Strategic opportunities (i.e., positive risks) are characterized and are included in organizational cybersecurity risk discussions.

controls.title: Organizational leadership is responsible and accountable for cybersecurity risk and fosters a culture that is risk-aware, ethical, and continually improving
controls.description: Organizational leadership is responsible and accountable for cybersecurity risk and fosters a culture that is risk-aware, ethical, and continually improving.

controls.title: Roles, responsibilities, and authorities related to cybersecurity risk management are established, communicated, understood, and enforced
controls.description: Roles, responsibilities, and authorities related to cybersecurity risk management are established, communicated, understood, and enforced.

controls.title: Adequate resources are allocated commensurate with the cybersecurity risk strategy, roles, responsibilities, and policies
controls.description: Adequate resources are allocated commensurate with the cybersecurity risk strategy, roles, responsibilities, and policies.

controls.title: Cybersecurity is included in human resources practices
controls.description: Cybersecurity is included in human resources practices.

controls.title: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organizational context, cybersecurity strategy, and priorities and is communicated and enforced
controls.description: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organizational context, cybersecurity strategy, and priorities and is communicated and enforced.

controls.title: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is reviewed, updated, communicated, and enforced to reflect changes in requirements, threats, technology, and organizational mission
controls.description: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is reviewed, updated, communicated, and enforced to reflect changes in requirements, threats, technology, and organizational mission.

controls.title: Cybersecurity risk management strategy outcomes are reviewed to inform and adjust strategy and direction
controls.description: Cybersecurity risk management strategy outcomes are reviewed to inform and adjust strategy and direction.

controls.title: The cybersecurity risk management strategy is reviewed and adjusted to ensure coverage of organizational requirements and risks
controls.description: The cybersecurity risk management strategy is reviewed and adjusted to ensure coverage of organizational requirements and risks.

controls.title: Organizational cybersecurity risk management performance is evaluated and reviewed for adjustments needed
controls.description: Organizational cybersecurity risk management performance is evaluated and reviewed for adjustments needed.

controls.title: A cybersecurity supply chain risk management program, strategy, objectives, policies, and processes are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders
controls.description: A cybersecurity supply chain risk management program, strategy, objectives, policies, and processes are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders.

controls.title: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for suppliers, customers, and partners are established, communicated, and coordinated internally and externally
controls.description: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for suppliers, customers, and partners are established, communicated, and coordinated internally and externally.

controls.title: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management is integrated into cybersecurity and enterprise risk management, risk assessment, and improvement processes
controls.description: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management is integrated into cybersecurity and enterprise risk management, risk assessment, and improvement processes.

controls.title: Suppliers are known and prioritized by criticality
controls.description: Suppliers are known and prioritized by criticality.

controls.title: Requirements to address cybersecurity risks in supply chains are established, prioritized, and integrated into contracts and other types of agreements with suppliers and other relevant third parties
controls.description: Requirements to address cybersecurity risks in supply chains are established, prioritized, and integrated into contracts and other types of agreements with suppliers and other relevant third parties.

controls.title: Planning and due diligence are performed to reduce risks before entering into formal supplier or other third-party relationships
controls.description: Planning and due diligence are performed to reduce risks before entering into formal supplier or other third-party relationships.

controls.title: The risks posed by a supplier, their products and services, and other third parties are understood, recorded, prioritized, assessed, responded to, and monitored over the course of the relationship
controls.description: The risks posed by a supplier, their products and services, and other third parties are understood, recorded, prioritized, assessed, responded to, and monitored over the course of the relationship.

controls.title: Relevant suppliers and other third parties are included in incident planning, response, and recovery activities
controls.description: Relevant suppliers and other third parties are included in incident planning, response, and recovery activities.

controls.title: Supply chain security practices are integrated into cybersecurity and enterprise risk management programs, and their performance is monitored throughout the technology product and service life cycle
controls.description: Supply chain security practices are integrated into cybersecurity and enterprise risk management programs, and their performance is monitored throughout the technology product and service life cycle.

controls.title: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management plans include provisions for activities that occur after the conclusion of a partnership or service agreement
controls.description: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management plans include provisions for activities that occur after the conclusion of a partnership or service agreement.

controls.title: Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained
controls.description: Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained.

controls.title: Inventories of software, services, and systems managed by the organization are maintained
controls.description: Inventories of software, services, and systems managed by the organization are maintained.

controls.title: Representations of the organization's authorized network communication and internal and external network data flows are maintained
controls.description: Representations of the organization's authorized network communication and internal and external network data flows are maintained.

controls.title: Inventories of services provided by suppliers are maintained
controls.description: Inventories of services provided by suppliers are maintained.

controls.title: Assets are prioritized based on classification, criticality, resources, and impact on the mission
controls.description: Assets are prioritized based on classification, criticality, resources, and impact on the mission.

controls.title: Inventories of data and corresponding metadata for designated data types are maintained
controls.description: Inventories of data and corresponding metadata for designated data types are maintained.

controls.title: Systems, hardware, software, services, and data are managed throughout their life cycles
controls.description: Systems, hardware, software, services, and data are managed throughout their life cycles.

controls.title: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded
controls.description: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded.

controls.title: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources
controls.description: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources.

controls.title: Internal and external threats to the organization are identified and recorded
controls.description: Internal and external threats to the organization are identified and recorded.

controls.title: Potential impacts and likelihoods of threats exploiting vulnerabilities are identified and recorded
controls.description: Potential impacts and likelihoods of threats exploiting vulnerabilities are identified and recorded.

controls.title: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to understand inherent risk and inform risk response prioritization
controls.description: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to understand inherent risk and inform risk response prioritization.

controls.title: Risk responses are chosen, prioritized, planned, tracked, and communicated
controls.description: Risk responses are chosen, prioritized, planned, tracked, and communicated.

controls.title: Changes and exceptions are managed, assessed for risk impact, recorded, and tracked
controls.description: Changes and exceptions are managed, assessed for risk impact, recorded, and tracked.

controls.title: Processes for receiving, analyzing, and responding to vulnerability disclosures are established
controls.description: Processes for receiving, analyzing, and responding to vulnerability disclosures are established.

controls.title: The authenticity and integrity of hardware and software are assessed prior to acquisition and use
controls.description: The authenticity and integrity of hardware and software are assessed prior to acquisition and use.

controls.title: Critical suppliers are assessed prior to acquisition
controls.description: Critical suppliers are assessed prior to acquisition.

controls.title: Improvements are identified from evaluations
controls.description: Improvements are identified from evaluations.

controls.title: Improvements are identified from security tests and exercises, including those done in coordination with suppliers and relevant third parties
controls.description: Improvements are identified from security tests and exercises, including those done in coordination with suppliers and relevant third parties.

controls.title: Improvements are identified from execution of operational processes, procedures, and activities
controls.description: Improvements are identified from execution of operational processes, procedures, and activities.

controls.title: Incident response plans and other cybersecurity plans that affect operations are established, communicated, maintained, and improved
controls.description: Incident response plans and other cybersecurity plans that affect operations are established, communicated, maintained, and improved.

controls.title: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware are managed by the organization
controls.description: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware are managed by the organization.

controls.title: Identities are proofed and bound to credentials based on the context of interactions
controls.description: Identities are proofed and bound to credentials based on the context of interactions.

controls.title: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated
controls.description: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated.

controls.title: Identity assertions are protected, conveyed, and verified
controls.description: Identity assertions are protected, conveyed, and verified.

controls.title: Access permissions, entitlements, and authorizations are defined in a policy, managed, enforced, and reviewed, and incorporate the principles of least privilege and separation of duties
controls.description: Access permissions, entitlements, and authorizations are defined in a policy, managed, enforced, and reviewed, and incorporate the principles of least privilege and separation of duties.

controls.title: Physical access to assets is managed, monitored, and enforced commensurate with risk
controls.description: Physical access to assets is managed, monitored, and enforced commensurate with risk.

controls.title: Personnel are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform general tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind
controls.description: Personnel are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform general tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind.

controls.title: Individuals in specialized roles are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform relevant tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind
controls.description: Individuals in specialized roles are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform relevant tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind.

controls.title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected
controls.description: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected.

controls.title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected
controls.description: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected.

controls.title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-use are protected
controls.description: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-use are protected.

controls.title: Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested
controls.description: Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested.

controls.title: Configuration management practices are established and applied
controls.description: Configuration management practices are established and applied.

controls.title: Software is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
controls.description: Software is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk.

controls.title: Hardware is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
controls.description: Hardware is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk.

controls.title: Log records are generated and made available for continuous monitoring
controls.description: Log records are generated and made available for continuous monitoring.

controls.title: Installation and execution of unauthorized software are prevented
controls.description: Installation and execution of unauthorized software are prevented.

controls.title: Secure software development practices are integrated, and their performance is monitored throughout the software development life cycle
controls.description: Secure software development practices are integrated, and their performance is monitored throughout the software development life cycle.

controls.title: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access and usage
controls.description: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access and usage.

controls.title: The organization's technology assets are protected from environmental threats
controls.description: The organization's technology assets are protected from environmental threats.

controls.title: Mechanisms are implemented to achieve resilience requirements in normal and adverse situations
controls.description: Mechanisms are implemented to achieve resilience requirements in normal and adverse situations.

controls.title: Adequate resource capacity to ensure availability is maintained
controls.description: Adequate resource capacity to ensure availability is maintained.

controls.title: Networks and network services are monitored to find potentially adverse events
controls.description: Networks and network services are monitored to find potentially adverse events.

controls.title: The physical environment is monitored to find potentially adverse events
controls.description: The physical environment is monitored to find potentially adverse events.

controls.title: Personnel activity and technology usage are monitored to find potentially adverse events
controls.description: Personnel activity and technology usage are monitored to find potentially adverse events.

controls.title: External service provider activities and services are monitored to find potentially adverse events
controls.description: External service provider activities and services are monitored to find potentially adverse events.

controls.title: Computing hardware and software, runtime environments, and their data are monitored to find potentially adverse events
controls.description: Computing hardware and software, runtime environments, and their data are monitored to find potentially adverse events.

controls.title: Potentially adverse events are analyzed to better understand associated activities
controls.description: Potentially adverse events are analyzed to better understand associated activities.

controls.title: Information is correlated from multiple sources
controls.description: Information is correlated from multiple sources.

controls.title: The estimated impact and scope of adverse events are understood
controls.description: The estimated impact and scope of adverse events are understood.

controls.title: Information on adverse events is provided to authorized staff and tools
controls.description: Information on adverse events is provided to authorized staff and tools.

controls.title: Cyber threat intelligence and other contextual information are integrated into the analysis
controls.description: Cyber threat intelligence and other contextual information are integrated into the analysis.

controls.title: Incidents are declared when adverse events meet the defined incident criteria
controls.description: Incidents are declared when adverse events meet the defined incident criteria.

controls.title: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared
controls.description: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared.

controls.title: Incident reports are triaged and validated
controls.description: Incident reports are triaged and validated.

controls.title: Incidents are categorized and prioritized
controls.description: Incidents are categorized and prioritized.

controls.title: Incidents are escalated or elevated as needed
controls.description: Incidents are escalated or elevated as needed.

controls.title: The criteria for initiating incident recovery are applied
controls.description: The criteria for initiating incident recovery are applied.

controls.title: Analysis is performed to establish what has taken place during an incident and the root cause of the incident
controls.description: Analysis is performed to establish what has taken place during an incident and the root cause of the incident.

controls.title: Actions performed during an investigation are recorded, and the records' integrity and provenance are preserved
controls.description: Actions performed during an investigation are recorded, and the records' integrity and provenance are preserved.

controls.title: Incident data and metadata are collected, and their integrity and provenance are preserved
controls.description: Incident data and metadata are collected, and their integrity and provenance are preserved.

controls.title: An incident's magnitude is estimated and validated
controls.description: An incident's magnitude is estimated and validated.

controls.title: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
controls.description: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents.

controls.title: Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders
controls.description: Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders.

controls.title: Incidents are contained
controls.description: Incidents are contained.

controls.title: Incidents are eradicated
controls.description: Incidents are eradicated.

controls.title: The recovery portion of the incident response plan is executed once initiated from the incident response process
controls.description: The recovery portion of the incident response plan is executed once initiated from the incident response process.

controls.title: Recovery actions are selected, scoped, prioritized, and performed
controls.description: Recovery actions are selected, scoped, prioritized, and performed.

controls.title: The integrity of backups and other restoration assets is verified before using them for restoration
controls.description: The integrity of backups and other restoration assets is verified before using them for restoration.

controls.title: Critical mission functions and cybersecurity risk management are considered to establish post-incident operational norms
controls.description: Critical mission functions and cybersecurity risk management are considered to establish post-incident operational norms.

controls.title: The integrity of restored assets is verified, systems and services are restored, and normal operating status is confirmed
controls.description: The integrity of restored assets is verified, systems and services are restored, and normal operating status is confirmed.

controls.title: The end of incident recovery is declared based on criteria, and incident-related documentation is completed
controls.description: The end of incident recovery is declared based on criteria, and incident-related documentation is completed.

controls.title: Recovery activities and progress in restoring operational capabilities are communicated to designated internal and external stakeholders
controls.description: Recovery activities and progress in restoring operational capabilities are communicated to designated internal and external stakeholders.

controls.title: Public updates on incident recovery are shared using approved methods and messaging
controls.description: Public updates on incident recovery are shared using approved methods and messaging.
